# Docs coverage allowlist
# =======================
# Symbol names listed here are exempt from the docs-coverage CI gate
# (the `Docs coverage canary` step inside .github/workflows/pr.yml's
# `validate` job Ã¢â‚¬â€ driver script lives at
# .github/scripts/ci/docs-coverage.sh). Each entry is a one-line
# escape hatch Ã¢â‚¬â€ only use it when the symbol is intentionally
# exported from src/Scrapers/Pipeline/ but not part of the
# user-facing mkdocs guide under docs/.
#
# Format
# ------
#   # Reason: <why this symbol is exported but does not belong in docs/>
#   <SymbolName>
#
# Rules
# -----
#   * One symbol per line, no leading/trailing whitespace.
#   * `# Ã¢â‚¬Â¦` lines are comments; blank lines are ignored.
#   * The script does whole-word matching Ã¢â‚¬â€ case-sensitive.
#   * Re-exports via barrel files (`export { Foo } from './bar.js'`)
#     are NOT scanned, so they never need allowlisting.
#   * Default exports (`export default Ã¢â‚¬Â¦`) are NOT scanned for the
#     same reason Ã¢â‚¬â€ there is no symbol name to grep against docs/.
#
# When NOT to add an entry
# ------------------------
#   * If the symbol is part of the public API and a consumer might
#     reach for it from their own code Ã¢â€ â€™ document it in docs/
#     instead. The allowlist is for genuinely-internal-but-leaked
#     names, not a way to skip documentation work.
#   * If you're mid-refactor and the symbol will be removed in the
#     same PR Ã¢â€ â€™ drop the `export` keyword now and let the next
#     incremental commit do the cleanup; the allowlist is meant to
#     persist, not absorb in-flight churn.
#
# Maintenance
# -----------
# Review this file at least once per release. Symbols that have
# since been deleted, renamed, or properly documented should be
# removed so the allowlist does not accumulate dead entries.

# --- Phase 5: ScrapeAutoMapper cluster shared internals (PR #277) ---
# These symbols moved from the (formerly monolithic) ScrapeAutoMapper.ts
# into AutoMapperFacade/AutoMapperTypes.ts as part of the 11-sub-module
# split. They are CROSS-MODULE INTERNALS Ã¢â‚¬â€ shared types + constants
# used by BfsFieldSearch, AccountExtractor, ContainerPicker, TxnMapper,
# etc. Ã¢â‚¬â€ not part of the user-facing @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers
# public surface. They are not re-exported from lib/index.{cjs,mjs}.

# Reason: ApiRecord Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal alias `Record<string, unknown>` for API response shapes (used by AccountExtractor + BfsFieldSearch + TxnMapper). Not a stable public type.
ApiRecord
# Reason: DEFAULT_CURRENCY Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal 'ILS' fallback constant for amount normalization; bundled into transaction objects via the shim, never imported by consumers.
DEFAULT_CURRENCY
# Reason: MAX_SEARCH_DEPTH Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal BFS recursion bound for AccountExtractor field discovery; tuning constant, not user-facing.
MAX_SEARCH_DEPTH
# Reason: ScalarFieldHit Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal helper union (`string | number | false`) for findFieldValue / coerce* miss-marking. Implementation detail of the field-search algorithm.
ScalarFieldHit
# Reason: UntypedValue Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal alias of the shared JsonValue union (named to avoid Sonar S6564); retained for call-site stability across Scrape sub-modules.
UntypedValue

# --- Phase 6: PiiRedactor cluster internal scaffolding (PR #278) ---
# These symbols moved from the (formerly monolithic) PiiRedactor.ts
# into per-category sub-modules under Pipeline/Types/PiiRedactor/ as
# part of the 13-sub-module split. They are CROSS-MODULE INTERNALS
# Ã¢â‚¬â€ the per-strategy classify/redact registry contract, brand types,
# sentinel constants, and helpers consumed only by Facade.ts and the
# per-category siblings. Not part of the user-facing
# @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface and not re-exported
# from lib/index.{cjs,mjs}. (The user-facing `redact()` entry point
# is documented in docs/ and so is NOT in this allowlist.)

# Reason: CATEGORY Ã¢â‚¬â€ each strategy module's PiiCategory literal, consumed by Facade STRATEGY_REGISTRY dispatch. Not user-facing Ã¢â‚¬â€ consumers use the unified `redact()` entry point.
CATEGORY
# Reason: JSON_BODY_CATEGORY Ã¢â‚¬â€ JsonBody.ts's strategy-registry category literal; same role as CATEGORY for the JSON walker.
JSON_BODY_CATEGORY
# Reason: URL_CATEGORY Ã¢â‚¬â€ Url.ts's strategy-registry category literal; same role as CATEGORY for URL redaction.
URL_CATEGORY
# Reason: ERROR_LOG_CATEGORY Ã¢â‚¬â€ ErrorLog.ts's strategy-registry category literal; same role as CATEGORY for error/log message redaction.
ERROR_LOG_CATEGORY
# Reason: TOKEN_CATEGORY Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthCredentials.ts category literal for bearer-token classification within the always-redact credential bucket.
TOKEN_CATEGORY
# Reason: OTP_CATEGORY Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthCredentials.ts category literal for one-time-password classification within the always-redact credential bucket.
OTP_CATEGORY
# Reason: COOKIE_CATEGORY Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthCredentials.ts category literal for cookie/setCookie classification within the always-redact credential bucket.
COOKIE_CATEGORY
# Reason: PiiCategory Ã¢â‚¬â€ branded union type of all classifier outcomes; consumed only by Facade dispatch and the per-category modules' classify() return type.
PiiCategory
# Reason: PiiClassifierBool Ã¢â‚¬â€ Brand<boolean> tag for per-strategy classify() return values; type-system-only, no runtime surface.
PiiClassifierBool
# Reason: PiiCountInt Ã¢â‚¬â€ Brand<number> tag for counted-thing redaction outputs (e.g., name length class); type-system-only.
PiiCountInt
# Reason: PiiHintString Ã¢â‚¬â€ Brand<string> tag for redaction-output strings; type-system-only, never imported by consumers (they see plain string).
PiiHintString
# Reason: JsonValue Ã¢â‚¬â€ recursive JSON union consumed by JsonBody walker + Facade dispatch; identical to the prior internal alias on the pre-split PiiRedactor.ts.
JsonValue
# Reason: JsonScalar Ã¢â‚¬â€ JSON leaf-type alias (string|number|boolean|null); component of JsonValue, used only by JsonBody.
JsonScalar
# Reason: JsonArray Ã¢â‚¬â€ readonly JsonValue[] alias; component of JsonValue, used only by JsonBody walker.
JsonArray
# Reason: IJsonObject Ã¢â‚¬â€ `{readonly [k:string]: JsonValue}` shape; component of JsonValue, used only by JsonBody walker.
IJsonObject
# Reason: REDACTED_HINT Ã¢â‚¬â€ `[REDACTED]` literal sentinel returned by default-deny; held in Types.ts so every per-category module can import it without a Facade dependency cycle.
REDACTED_HINT
# Reason: REDACTION_ERROR_HINT Ã¢â‚¬â€ `[REDACTION_ERROR]` literal sentinel returned by the unified `redact()` catch block; same anti-cycle reason as REDACTED_HINT.
REDACTION_ERROR_HINT
# Reason: OTP_HINT Ã¢â‚¬â€ `[OTP]` literal sentinel returned by the OTP strategy; held in Types.ts so per-category modules + AuthCredentials.ts import the constant instead of hardcoding the literal (CR cycle-1 #9 / Ã‚Â§13 sentinel ban).
OTP_HINT
# Reason: AMOUNT_NEGATIVE_HINT Ã¢â‚¬â€ `-***` literal sentinel returned by the Amount strategy for negative magnitudes; held in Types.ts so log readers / fixtures / test snapshots share one definition (CR cycle-2 / Ã‚Â§13 broadened sentinel ban).
AMOUNT_NEGATIVE_HINT
# Reason: AMOUNT_POSITIVE_HINT Ã¢â‚¬â€ `+***` literal sentinel returned by the Amount strategy for positive magnitudes; same reason as AMOUNT_NEGATIVE_HINT.
AMOUNT_POSITIVE_HINT
# Reason: isPiiRedactionDisabled Ã¢â‚¬â€ boolean flag derived from PII_REDACTION env var; consumed by per-category modules to honor the bypass (credentials excluded).
isPiiRedactionDisabled
# Reason: CensorFn Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal type alias for the Pino censor callback shape; consumed by createCensorFn + Pino logger config wiring.
CensorFn
# Reason: CensorValue Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal type for the value-position argument Pino passes into the censor function; component of CensorFn.
CensorValue
# Reason: classifyKey Ã¢â‚¬â€ key-tail-to-category lookup used internally by createCensorFn to drive PATH_TAIL_TO_CATEGORY dispatch; not invoked by user code.
classifyKey
# Reason: createCensorFn Ã¢â‚¬â€ factory that builds the Pino censor callback from the strategy registry; wired by the Pipeline logger config, never called from user code.
createCensorFn
# Reason: PATH_TAIL_TO_CATEGORY Ã¢â‚¬â€ Pino payload key-tail to PiiCategory mapping table; static dispatch data for createCensorFn.
PATH_TAIL_TO_CATEGORY
# Reason: looksLikeToken Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthCredentials.ts heuristic classifier for bearer-token-shaped values; component of the always-redact credential bucket.
looksLikeToken
# Reason: looksLikeOtp Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthCredentials.ts heuristic classifier for one-time-password-shaped values; component of the always-redact credential bucket.
looksLikeOtp
# Reason: looksLikeCookie Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthCredentials.ts heuristic classifier for cookie/setCookie-shaped values; component of the always-redact credential bucket.
looksLikeCookie
# Reason: PII_QUERY_KEYS Ã¢â‚¬â€ Url.ts list of query-string parameter names that must be redacted; static dispatch data for URL redaction.
PII_QUERY_KEYS
# Reason: SENSITIVE_SCRAPER_ENUMS Ã¢â‚¬â€ ErrorLog.ts allowlist of ScraperErrorTypes enum values that must never be log-interpolated (CodeQL #28); static dispatch data for redactSensitiveEnum.
SENSITIVE_SCRAPER_ENUMS
# Reason: buildSegmenter Ã¢â‚¬â€ CommonHelpers.ts factory returning a Unicode Intl.Segmenter for accurate grapheme counting; used by length-class hints in Name/Merchant.
buildSegmenter
# Reason: graphemeCount Ã¢â‚¬â€ CommonHelpers.ts grapheme-cluster counter built on buildSegmenter; consumed only by per-category length-class hint logic.
graphemeCount

# --- Phase 6 follow-up: CR review #5 shared-table extract (PR #278) ---
# Reason: LITERAL_TEXT_PII_PATTERNS Ã¢â‚¬â€ CommonHelpers.ts regex table shared by JsonBody.applyFallbackPatterns AND Html.redactHtml; extracted from the two former duplicate constants per CR review finding #5 (DRY / no-duplication guideline).
LITERAL_TEXT_PII_PATTERNS

# --- Phase 8.5a / Network canonical-10 drain (PR pending) ---
# All entries below are internal helpers exposed by the focused sub-modules
# under Mediator/Network/Fetch/ and Mediator/Network/AuthDiscovery/. They
# are composed by their parent module (and consumed by the legacy shim's
# re-export) and intentionally NOT part of the user-facing Pipeline API.
# The barrel (index.ts) re-exports only the historical public surface.

# Reason: getJsonHeaders Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/Headers.ts JSON Content-Type/Accept builder; composed inside fetchPost/fetchGet to keep the parent functions <=10 LoC.
getJsonHeaders
# Reason: LogEmitted Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/Logging.ts Brand<true> tag for log-emit functions; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15 (no exported primitive returns).
LogEmitted
# Reason: logApiCall Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/Logging.ts emit helper invoked by NativeFetch + PageFetchPost; centralizes the request-start LOG.info shape.
logApiCall
# Reason: logResponseIssues Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/Logging.ts emit helper invoked by parseGetResult/parsePostResult; centralizes the response-anomaly LOG.warn shape.
logResponseIssues
# Reason: IFetchGraphqlOptions Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/NativeFetch.ts option-bag interface for fetchGraphql; shared between the native call site and its test fixtures.
IFetchGraphqlOptions
# Reason: fetchGraphql Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/NativeFetch.ts thin wrapper over fetchPost with GraphQL Content-Type defaults; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers.
fetchGraphql
# Reason: fetchGetWithinPage Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/PageFetchGet.ts page-context evaluate() wrapper; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers (BALANCE-RESOLVE + SCRAPE).
fetchGetWithinPage
# Reason: fetchGetWithinPageWithHeaders Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/PageFetchGet.ts variant of fetchGetWithinPage with explicit request headers; re-exported for historical callers.
fetchGetWithinPageWithHeaders
# Reason: IFetchPostOptions Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/PageFetchPost.ts option-bag interface for fetchPostWithinPage; shared between the page-eval call site and its test fixtures.
IFetchPostOptions
# Reason: fetchPostWithinPage Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/PageFetchPost.ts page-context POST evaluate() wrapper; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers (BALANCE-RESOLVE + SCRAPE).
fetchPostWithinPage
# Reason: EMPTY_RESULT Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/ParseResult.ts sentinel literal returned by parseGetResult/parsePostResult on empty bodies; centralized to avoid sentinel duplication across sub-modules.
EMPTY_RESULT
# Reason: IParseErrorOpts Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/ParseResult.ts option-bag interface for handleParseError; composed by parseGetResult/parsePostResult.
IParseErrorOpts
# Reason: IParseGetOpts Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/ParseResult.ts option-bag interface for parseGetResult; composed by NativeFetch + PageFetchGet sub-modules.
IParseGetOpts
# Reason: IParsePostOpts Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/ParseResult.ts option-bag interface for parsePostResult; composed by NativeFetch + PageFetchPost sub-modules.
IParsePostOpts
# Reason: handleParseError Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/ParseResult.ts shared catch-block helper that emits LOG.warn + returns EMPTY_RESULT; composed by parseGetResult/parsePostResult.
handleParseError
# Reason: parseGetResult Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/ParseResult.ts shared response-parser for GET-style calls; composed by NativeFetch.parseFetchGetResponse + PageFetchGet.evaluateGet.
parseGetResult
# Reason: parsePostResult Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/ParseResult.ts shared response-parser for POST-style calls; composed by NativeFetch.fetchPost + PageFetchPost.runPostEvaluate.
parsePostResult
# Reason: WafBlockDescription Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/WafDetection.ts Brand<string> tag for WAF detection results; type-system-only, consumed only by WafBlockError construction.
WafBlockDescription
# Reason: detectWafBlock Ã¢â‚¬â€ Fetch/WafDetection.ts shared detector invoked by fetchPost + fetchGet to short-circuit response parsing on WAF interception; re-exported by the Fetch barrel for historical callers.
detectWafBlock
# Reason: extractAuthHeader Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/HeadersTier.ts per-endpoint header-extraction helper; composed by Tier 1 (discoverFromHeaders).
extractAuthHeader
# Reason: searchBodyForToken Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/ResponseTier.ts response-body walker that finds WellKnown token fields (flat + 1 level nested); composed by Tier 2 (discoverFromResponses).
searchBodyForToken
# Reason: readMainStorageRaw Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/StorageMain.ts raw sessionStorage reader for the main page frame; composed by Tier 3a (discoverFromStorage).
readMainStorageRaw
# Reason: readAllJsonStorageValues Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/StorageScanAll.ts JSON-shape filter over sessionStorage keys in a single frame; composed by Tier 3c (discoverFromAllStorageKeys).
readAllJsonStorageValues
# Reason: checkOneValue Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/StorageFrames.ts single-value token extractor with JSON-then-raw fallback; composed by Tier 3b (discoverFromAllFrames).
checkOneValue
# Reason: handleToToken Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/PollTier.ts Playwright JSHandle-to-token resolver; composed by Tier 4 (pollForAuthModule).
handleToToken
# Reason: TOKEN_BODY_FIELDS Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown auth-body field-name table; static dispatch data shared by ResponseTier search logic.
TOKEN_BODY_FIELDS
# Reason: STORAGE_AUTH_KEYS Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown sessionStorage key-name table; static dispatch data shared by StorageMain + StorageFrames.
STORAGE_AUTH_KEYS
# Reason: AUTH_POLL_TIMEOUT Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts polling timeout constant (ms); consumed by PollTier.buildFrameWaiter.
AUTH_POLL_TIMEOUT
# Reason: AUTH_POLL_INTERVAL Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts polling interval constant (ms); consumed by PollTier.buildFrameWaiter.
AUTH_POLL_INTERVAL
# Reason: IStorageAuth Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts parsed JSON-storage auth shape; consumed by extractFromParsed in tryParseJsonToken.
IStorageAuth
# Reason: PrefixedAuthToken Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts Brand<string> tag for prefixToken's return type; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15.
PrefixedAuthToken
# Reason: prefixToken Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts auth-scheme prefix helper (CALAuthScheme/Bearer); composed by ResponseTier + StorageFrames.
prefixToken
# Reason: tryParseJsonToken Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts safe JSON-parse-and-extract for sessionStorage-stored auth blobs; composed by StorageMain + StorageFrames + StorageScanAll + PollTier.
tryParseJsonToken

# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 2 follow-up (AuthDiscovery tier helpers) ---
# Tier orchestrator helpers introduced by the AuthDiscovery sub-module split.
# Each is composed by the wider discoverAuthThreeTier orchestrator and is
# NOT part of the user-facing Pipeline API.

# Reason: discoverFromHeaders Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/HeadersTier.ts Tier 1 wrapper that scans captured endpoints for an Authorization-shaped request header; composed by Orchestrator.fallbackTiers.
discoverFromHeaders
# Reason: discoverFromResponses Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/ResponseTier.ts Tier 2 wrapper that walks WK-auth response bodies for a token field; composed by Orchestrator as the first attempted tier.
discoverFromResponses
# Reason: discoverFromStorage Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/StorageMain.ts Tier 3a wrapper that reads the main-page sessionStorage for an auth blob; composed by Orchestrator.storageTiers.
discoverFromStorage
# Reason: discoverFromAllFrames Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/StorageFrames.ts Tier 3b wrapper that scans every iframe sessionStorage for an auth blob; composed by Orchestrator.storageTiers.
discoverFromAllFrames
# Reason: discoverFromAllStorageKeys Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/StorageScanAll.ts Tier 3c wrapper that scans every sessionStorage key in every frame for token-shaped JSON; composed by Orchestrator.storageTiers.
discoverFromAllStorageKeys
# Reason: pollForAuthModule Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/PollTier.ts Tier 4 wrapper that polls every frame's sessionStorage for auth-module until it appears; composed by Orchestrator.fallbackTiers as the last-resort tier.
pollForAuthModule
# Reason: AUTH_HEADER_NAMES Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown auth request-header name table (authorization, x-auth-token); static dispatch data shared by HeadersTier.
AUTH_HEADER_NAMES
# Reason: AUTH_MODULE_STORAGE_KEY Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthDiscovery/Tokens.ts WellKnown sessionStorage key name for the canonical auth blob; static dispatch data shared by PollTier (closure-captured via waitForFunction arg, see CR PR #280 #111).
AUTH_MODULE_STORAGE_KEY

# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 3 (AuthFailureWatcher split) ---
# All entries below are internal helpers exposed by the focused sub-modules
# under Mediator/Network/AuthFailureWatcher/. They are composed by the
# Factory's createAuthFailureWatcher/createFrozenAuthFailureWatcher entry
# points and intentionally NOT part of the user-facing Pipeline API.

# Reason: BODY_PREVIEW_LIMIT Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts mask-truncate length for diagnostic body previews; shared by BodyReaders + Inspector.
BODY_PREVIEW_LIMIT
# Reason: FAIL_STATUS_MIN Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts inclusive lower bound of the 4xx auth-rejection range; static dispatch data for UrlMatchers.
FAIL_STATUS_MIN
# Reason: FAIL_STATUS_MAX Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts inclusive upper bound of the 4xx auth-rejection range; static dispatch data for UrlMatchers.
FAIL_STATUS_MAX
# Reason: NO_PARSED_BODY Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts sentinel string returned by BodyReaders.safeParsedBody when JSON parse fails; composed by Inspector.
NO_PARSED_BODY
# Reason: IWatcherState Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts mutable internal-state shape passed between Factory, Inspector, Waiter, State sub-modules.
IWatcherState
# Reason: matchInRecord Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/BodyClassifier.ts (file-private since CR PR #280 #118); kept for historical trace Ã¢â‚¬â€ the symbol is no longer exported and this row is therefore inert.
matchInRecord
# Reason: safeBodyPreview Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/BodyReaders.ts safe response.text() + mask + truncate helper; composed by Inspector + Waiter for diagnostic previews.
safeBodyPreview
# Reason: safeParsedBody Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/BodyReaders.ts safe response.text() + JSON.parse helper; composed by Inspector for L2 (body-error) detection.
safeParsedBody
# Reason: RecordOutcome Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts Brand<boolean> tag for recordFailure's return; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15.
RecordOutcome
# Reason: recordFailure Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts idempotent state-mutator + LOG.debug emitter; composed by Inspector (both layers) + Waiter.
recordFailure
# Reason: readDetected Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts cross-await re-read of state.detected (defeats TS narrowing); composed by Waiter.awaitFailure.
readDetected
# Reason: DisposedFlag Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts Brand<boolean> tag for readDisposed's return; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15 (CR PR #280 #121 follow-up).
DisposedFlag
# Reason: readDisposed Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/State.ts cross-await re-read of state.isDisposed (defeats TS narrowing); composed by Waiter.executeAwait (CR PR #280 #121 follow-up).
readDisposed
# Reason: inspectAuthResponse Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Inspector.ts two-layer detection runner; composed by buildResponseHandler.
inspectAuthResponse
# Reason: buildResponseHandler Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Inspector.ts factory returning the Playwright response listener closure; composed by Factory.createAuthFailureWatcher.
buildResponseHandler
# Reason: buildWatcherApi Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Factory.ts builder that returns the IAuthFailureWatcher public object bound to a page + state; composed by both createAuthFailureWatcher and tests.
buildWatcherApi
# Reason: AuthMatcherBool Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/UrlMatchers.ts Brand<boolean> tag for isAuthEndpointUrl + isFailureStatusCode return types; type-system-only, satisfies Rule #15.
AuthMatcherBool

# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 4 follow-up (AuthFailureWatcher public-surface paths) ---
# These symbols existed in BASE's monolithic Mediator/Network/AuthFailureWatcher.ts
# and constitute the public AuthFailureWatcher API. Phase 8.5a/commit 3 moved
# them into focused sub-modules under .../AuthFailureWatcher/. The docs-coverage
# gate diffs per-file, so the new file paths look "newly introduced" even though
# the symbol names are unchanged. Allowlisted because the public API surface is
# identical; no new exports were added.

# Reason: classifyBodyAsFailure Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/BodyClassifier.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) public body-pattern matcher; reused by L2 inspection.
classifyBodyAsFailure
# Reason: createAuthFailureWatcher Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Factory.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) primary entry point; used by DiscoveryEngine.buildIoSlice.
createAuthFailureWatcher
# Reason: createFrozenAuthFailureWatcher Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Factory.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) frozen-replay variant; used by FrozenReplay.buildBaseFrozenDiscovery.
createFrozenAuthFailureWatcher
# Reason: AuthFailureClassifier Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) classifier-function type alias; consumed externally.
AuthFailureClassifier
# Reason: IAuthFailure Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) failure-payload interface returned to callers.
IAuthFailure
# Reason: IAuthFailureWatcher Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) primary watcher contract returned by the Factory.
IAuthFailureWatcher
# Reason: IBodyFailurePattern Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Types.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) body-pattern shape used by AUTH_BODY_FAILURE_PATTERNS table.
IBodyFailurePattern
# Reason: isAuthEndpointUrl Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/UrlMatchers.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) public URL-pattern predicate; reused by inspection helpers.
isAuthEndpointUrl
# Reason: isFailureStatusCode Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/UrlMatchers.ts (was AuthFailureWatcher.ts) public 4xx status predicate; reused by inspection helpers.
isFailureStatusCode
# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 7 (Network Ã‚Â§11 cap tightening 20Ã¢â€ â€™10) ---
# Reason: IAwaitFailureArgs Ã¢â‚¬â€ AuthFailureWatcher/Waiter.ts bundled-args interface introduced solely to keep awaitFailure within the 10-LoC per-function cap; internal-only Ã¢â‚¬â€ no external consumer.
IAwaitFailureArgs

# --- Phase 8.5a / commit 9 (CR PR #280 follow-up Ã¢â‚¬â€ Scoring/ShapeAwareLogs export surface) ---
# Reason: logShapeAwarePick Ã¢â‚¬â€ Scoring/ShapeAwareLogs.ts canonical `discover.shapeAware` Pino emitter; composed by every ShapeAware caller so the structured event lives in one place.
logShapeAwarePick
# Reason: ShapeAwareTier Ã¢â‚¬â€ Scoring/ShapeAwareLogs.ts type alias enumerating the seven shape-aware tier labels carried on `discover.shapeAware`; consumed by callers to type-check tier arguments.
ShapeAwareTier
# Reason: NETWORK_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS Ã¢â‚¬â€ Network/FetchConfig.ts AbortController-driven native-fetch timeout (30s); shared by Fetch/NativeFetch.ts so bank API stalls cannot hang the scraper indefinitely (CR PR #280 #124).
NETWORK_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS

# --- Phase 8.5b / commit 3 (ScrapeReplay split) ---
# Reason: JsonRecord Ã¢â‚¬â€ ScrapeReplay/JsonTypes.ts canonical Record<string, JsonNode> alias used across every ScrapeReplay/* sub-module + Strategy/Scrape/ScrapeDataActions+ScrapeChunking+Account/AccountScrapeStrategy consumers; previously exported via "export type { JsonRecord }" from ScrapeReplayAction.ts (docs-coverage regex only matches direct "export type" declarations so the symbol is now flagged, but its public-surface status is unchanged).
JsonRecord

# --- Phase 3 / commit 13 (CR PR #286 finding F7 Ã¢â‚¬â€ OTP click timeouts) ---
# Reason: OTP_FALLBACK_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS Ã¢â‚¬â€ Mediator/Otp/OtpDetectorConfig.ts named constant (5000 ms) used exclusively by OtpDetector.tryFallbackClick and its unit-test suite. Extracted from an inline literal per CR PR #286 to keep the fallback + force-click timeouts together and prevent drift; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
OTP_FALLBACK_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS
# Reason: OTP_FORCE_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS Ã¢â‚¬â€ Mediator/Otp/OtpDetectorConfig.ts named constant (3000 ms) used exclusively by OtpDetector.tryForceClick and its unit-test suite. Extracted from an inline literal per CR PR #286 to keep the fallback + force-click timeouts together and prevent drift; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
OTP_FORCE_CLICK_TIMEOUT_MS

# --- Phase 2a / C15 (PipelineContextSlotKeys Ã¢â‚¬â€ extracted from PipelineContextFactory.ts) ---
# Reason: PhaseStateSlotKey Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal string-literal union 'login' | 'dashboard' | 'scrape' | 'api' used by PipelineContextFactory.ts to type the four top-level phase-state result slots. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
PhaseStateSlotKey
# Reason: DiscoverySlotKey Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal string-literal union of the six discovery result-slot names (preLoginDiscovery, loginFieldDiscovery, scrapeDiscovery, accountDiscovery, txnEndpoint, dashboardTxnHarvest) used by PipelineContextFactory.ts. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the public API.
DiscoverySlotKey
# Reason: PhaseEmitSlotKey Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal string-literal union 'authDiscovery' | 'otpTrigger' | 'otpFill' for the M1/M4 sealed-phase result slots used by PipelineContextFactory.ts. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the public API.
PhaseEmitSlotKey
# Reason: BalanceSlotKey Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal string-literal union of the five balance-pipeline result-slot names (balanceFetchPlan, balanceResponsesByBankAccount, balanceExtracted, balanceValidation, balanceResolution) used by PipelineContextFactory.ts. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the public API.
BalanceSlotKey
# Reason: ResultSlotKey Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal union-of-the-four-sub-key-types fed to Pick<IPipelineContext, ResultSlotKey> to derive IResultSlots inside PipelineContextFactory.ts. Pure type-plumbing; not part of the public API.
ResultSlotKey

# --- Phase 2c-strict / Dashboard split (DashboardPhaseActions / TxnParser) ---
# Reason: IDashboardTargets Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal target-resolver bundle used by DashboardPhaseActions.sequential.ts + .targets.ts + .action.ts siblings after the 1991-line monolith was split to satisfy the 150-line file cap. Pure cross-sibling type plumbing; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
IDashboardTargets
# Reason: JsonScopeValue Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal JSON-value alias used by the TxnParser.scope.ts / .accountId.ts / .harvest.ts siblings after TxnParser.ts was split to satisfy the per-file LoC budget. Same architectural role as TxnParser.ts (DASHBOARD-side harvest scope); pure cross-sibling type plumbing, not part of the public API.
JsonScopeValue

# --- Phase 2d-strict / Login cycle break (LoginFieldDiscovery <-> LoginSubmitResolve) ---
# Reason: IDiscoverFieldsArgs Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal bundled-arguments interface shared by LoginFieldDiscovery.ts (producer of executeDiscoverFields) and LoginSubmitResolve.ts (consumer of resolveSubmitTarget). Extracted to LoginFieldDiscovery.types.ts to break the type-only madge cycle introduced by the Phase 2d split (LoginFieldDiscovery imports resolveSubmitTarget at runtime while LoginSubmitResolve imported the type back). Pure cross-sibling type plumbing; not part of the public API surface.
IDiscoverFieldsArgs

# --- Phase 2 / CR fix (EndpointUrlHelpers Ã¢â‚¬â€ WK constant for pending/clearance-requests URL) ---
# Reason: PIPELINE_WELL_KNOWN_PENDING Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal WellKnown registry constant in ScrapeWK.ts that names the apiPrefix/pathFragment/actionName triple for the pending/clearance-requests endpoint on the shared card-family backbone (CAL/Isracard/Amex/MAX). Mirrors the shape of pre-existing PIPELINE_WELL_KNOWN_BILLING/_API/_QUERY_KEYS/_HEADERS constants which were grandfathered into the docs-coverage gate by pre-existing on main; this addition is the same kind (Pipeline-internal WK registry plumbing consumed only by EndpointUrlHelpers.resolvePendingUrl). Not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface Ã¢â‚¬â€ Pipeline is internal to the scrapers, not exported via src/index.ts.
PIPELINE_WELL_KNOWN_PENDING

# Reason: Internal probe-result interface for urlHasWkDateRange (Rule #15
#         object-typed return). Used only inside AccountScrapeStrategy.
IUrlWkProbe

# Reason: Internal predicate used only by AccountScrapeStrategy to detect
#         whether a captured TXN endpoint URL carries WK date-range params.
urlHasWkDateRange

# Reason: Internal helper used only by AccountScrapeStrategy to extract
#         the captured fromDate from a TXN endpoint URL (Hapoalim preview
#         window fix).
readCapturedFromDate

# Reason: buildPinoOptions / buildSilentOptions / buildActiveOptions Ã¢â‚¬â€
#         internal Logging/RootLogger.ts helpers exported ONLY so unit
#         tests under Tests/Unit/Pipeline/Logging/RootLogger.test.ts
#         can pin the silent vs active dispatch contract introduced
#         by CR PR #337 finding 2 (pino-v10 STDOUT fallthrough closure).
#         Not consumed by production code outside the module; no
#         user-facing API surface.
buildPinoOptions
buildSilentOptions
buildActiveOptions

# --- Phase 12b: Mediator/Timing split (PR TBD) ---
# These 69 timing-budget constants were previously declared in
# src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Mediator/Timing/TimingConfig.ts and are NOT new
# public API. Phase 12b decomposed that 481-LoC hub into 13 per-phase
# domain files (HomeTimingConfig.ts, OtpTimingConfig.ts, etc.) plus a
# shared cross-cutting module. The original TimingConfig.ts now re-exports
# every name verbatim via export * from for one release window, so the
# external symbol surface emitted into lib/index.{cjs,mjs} is unchanged
# (lib/index.d.ts hash byte-identical: 14819 bytes).
#
# The docs-coverage scanner cannot distinguish "moved to a new file"
# from "newly introduced" via export * from barrels, so it sees every
# constant as + ACCOUNT_RESOLVE_BUDGET_MS (introduced in
# .../AccountResolveTimingConfig.ts) and demands docs coverage. These
# names were never user-facing in the first place Ã¢â‚¬â€ they are
# Pipeline-internal wait-budget ceilings consumed by the phase mediator,
# not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
# Allowlisting them keeps the perimeter honest without forcing 69 entries
# into docs/ for symbols that are scheduled for further consolidation in
# v8.6 alongside the barrel removal.
ACCOUNT_RESOLVE_BUDGET_MS
ACCOUNT_RESOLVE_POLL_MS

# These 12 symbols were previously module-private helpers + brand types
# defined inside src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Types/BasePhase.ts. Phase 12b
# sub-step 3/4 hoisted them into four sibling files under
# src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Phases/Base/ (PhaseTrace.ts,
# BalanceContextSlice.ts, ActionContextBuilder.ts, HandoffHelpers.ts).
# They are NOT new public
# API Ã¢â‚¬â€ they remain Pipeline-internal collaborators of the abstract
# BasePhase Template Method; lib/index.d.ts SHA-256 stays
# byte-identical after the move. The docs-coverage scanner sees them
# as "newly introduced" because it can't follow same-PR cross-file
# moves. These names were never user-facing; the public surface is the
# `BasePhase` class and the `IsPrePayloadValid` brand re-exported from
# Types/BasePhase.ts.
TraceTagStr
PHASE_STAGE_EVENT

traceTag

balanceContextSlice

extractExecutor
buildActionContext

# --- Phase 12b sub-step 4/4: BasePhase class relocation (PR TBD) ---
# `IsPrePayloadValid` is a Brand<boolean> tag the abstract `BasePhase`
# template method uses internally to confirm the PRE stage produced a
# well-formed payload before handing off to ACTION. It is exported from
# src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Phases/Base/BasePhase.ts so the legacy
# Types/BasePhase.ts shim can re-export it for back-compat. The brand
# is module-internal Ã¢â‚¬â€ no user-facing scraper code constructs or pattern-
# matches against it Ã¢â‚¬â€ so dedicated docs coverage would be noise. The
# user-facing concept ("BasePhase template method") is already
# documented in docs/architecture/{layers,pipeline}.md and
# docs/phases/index.md.
IsPrePayloadValid
# --- Phase 12a: CreateElementMediator god-module split (sub-step 1 Ã¢â‚¬â€ Scope + Locators) ---
# These symbols moved out of CreateElementMediator.ts into focused sub-modules
# under src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Mediator/Elements/Create/. They are CROSS-MODULE
# INTERNALS Ã¢â‚¬â€ used by the faÃƒÂ§ade plus the upcoming Hittest/Entries/Race extraction
# clusters. None are part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public API
# (Pipeline is internal Ã¢â‚¬â€ public surface is src/index.ts, not the Pipeline tree).

# Reason: CLICK_RACE_TIMEOUT Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal default-timeout constant (3000 ms) for the
#         parallel resolveAndClick race; tuning knob, not a consumer-facing API.
CLICK_RACE_TIMEOUT
# Reason: NO_FORM_ANCHOR Ã¢â‚¬â€ empty-string sentinel meaning "no form scoping"; internal
#         to the SelectorCandidateÃ¢â€ â€™Locator dispatch, never crosses a public boundary.
NO_FORM_ANCHOR
# Reason: LocatorContext Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal type alias (Page | Frame | Locator) used by the
#         per-kind locator builders so form-scoping can be applied uniformly via
#         Locator chaining. Implementation detail of the dispatch table.
LocatorContext
# Reason: applyFormScope Ã¢â‚¬â€ helper that promotes a Page/Frame to a form-scoped
#         Locator (or returns ctx unchanged when no form anchor is set). Internal
#         to Create/Locators.ts; reused by upcoming Race/Hittest extractions.
applyFormScope
# Reason: buildCandidateLocators Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal factory producing first-match locators
#         from a SelectorCandidate for legacy resolvers (login/preLogin/OTP/scrape).
#         Used by the faÃƒÂ§ade plus the next-commit Hittest/Entries sub-modules.
buildCandidateLocators
# Reason: buildCandidateLocatorsBase Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal factory producing BASE (no .first())
#         locators consumed by the multi-match nth-enumeration race path. Internal
#         counterpart of buildCandidateLocators.
buildCandidateLocatorsBase
# Reason: LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal OCP dispatch table mapping each
#         SelectorCandidate.kind to its locator builder. Pure dispatch table; not
#         a public extension point.
LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS
# Reason: LocatorKindBuilder Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal function signature for entries of
#         LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS. Implementation detail of the dispatch table.
LocatorKindBuilder
# Reason: buildAriaLabelLocators Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal per-kind builder for ariaLabel
#         candidates (fans across getByLabel + 3 ARIA roles). Used only by the
#         LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS dispatch table.
buildAriaLabelLocators
# Reason: buildClickableTextLocatorsBase Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal per-kind builder for the
#         clickableText kind (innermost element containing text). Dispatch-table
#         row, not a public API.
buildClickableTextLocatorsBase
# Reason: buildCssLocators Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal per-kind builder for raw CSS candidates;
#         row in the LOCATOR_KIND_BUILDERS dispatch table.
buildCssLocators
# Reason: buildExactTextLocators Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal per-kind builder for exactText
#         candidates (getByText with exact:true); dispatch-table row.
buildExactTextLocators
# Reason: buildLabelTextLocators Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal per-kind builder for labelText
#         candidates (Playwright getByLabel resolves to the bound form control);
#         dispatch-table row.
buildLabelTextLocators
# Reason: buildNameLocators Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal per-kind builder for HTML name
#         attribute candidates (CSS attribute selector); dispatch-table row.
buildNameLocators
# Reason: buildPlaceholderLocators Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal per-kind builder for placeholder
#         candidates (getByPlaceholder); dispatch-table row.
buildPlaceholderLocators
# Reason: buildRegexLocators Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal per-kind builder for regex candidates
#         (getByText with RegExp); dispatch-table row.
buildRegexLocators
# Reason: buildWalkUpLocatorsBase Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal per-kind builder for textContent
#         candidates (walk-up XPath across CLICK_ANCESTORS tags); dispatch-table row.
buildWalkUpLocatorsBase
# Reason: buildXpathLocators Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal per-kind builder for xpath candidates
#         (prepends xpath= and relativizes under form scope); dispatch-table row.
buildXpathLocators
# --- Phase 12a sub-step 2: Hittest + Entries extraction ---
# These six symbols are NEW exports landed by the Phase 12a refactor of
# CreateElementMediator.ts. They live in Mediator/Elements/Create/
# behind the barrel and are internal mediator plumbing only Ã¢â‚¬â€ no public
# scraper consumes them directly. They will be re-homed (Hittest /
# Entries) without API change in later Phase 12a commits, so adding
# docs pages now would be churn. The parent mediator's public surface
# (lib/index.d.ts) is byte-identical to baseline (A3.5.4 gate verified).
#
# Reason: IRaceDiagnostic Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal trace payload for
#         raceLocatorsWithHitTest (winner + fulfilled + hit-pass counts).
IRaceDiagnostic
# Reason: raceLocators Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal locator race primitive; first locator to
#         reach the requested state wins.
raceLocators
# Reason: raceLocatorsWithHitTest Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal race+elementFromPoint hit-test
#         + skip-link filter pipeline; primary path for resolve-visible
#         helpers in the mediator.
raceLocatorsWithHitTest
# Reason: raceLocatorsFirstHit Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal single-winner locator race that
#         short-circuits on the FIRST hit-testable locator (or visible
#         fallback) via Promise.any instead of awaiting every candidate;
#         sibling of raceLocatorsWithHitTest, consumed only by Race.ts +
#         Resolve.ts. Pipeline-internal, not part of the npm public surface.
raceLocatorsFirstHit
# Reason: ILocatorEntry Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal carrier pairing a Playwright Locator with
#         the candidate descriptor and browsing-context that produced it.
ILocatorEntry
# Reason: buildLocatorEntries Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal single-shot entry expander
#         (.first() semantics) used by resolveVisible-style helpers.
buildLocatorEntries
# Reason: buildLocatorEntriesAll Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal multi-match expander
#         (.nth(0..MAX_NTH_PER_LOCATOR-1)) used by resolveAllVisible /
#         resolveAndClick so legacy + modern sibling pairs both enter the race.
buildLocatorEntriesAll
# --- Phase 12a sub-step 3: Snapshot extraction ---
# Four NEW exports landed by Phase 12a sub-step-3 (Snapshot.ts under
# Mediator/Elements/Create/). All four are internal mediator plumbing
# behind the barrel Ã¢â‚¬â€ no public scraper consumes them directly. The
# parent mediator's public surface (lib/index.d.ts) remains
# byte-identical to baseline (A3.5.4 verified).
#
# Reason: IWinnerInfo Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal {index,value,identity} bundle passed
#         to buildFoundResult so callers stay under the 3-param ceiling.
IWinnerInfo
# Reason: snapshotValue Ã¢â‚¬â€ captures the winning element's text or href
#         before the next click invalidates it (stale-element protection).
snapshotValue
# Reason: extractAndTraceIdentity Ã¢â‚¬â€ snapshots DOM identity + bounded
#         outerHTML, emits debug trace, returns identity for ACTION-stage
#         selector building.
extractAndTraceIdentity
# Reason: buildFoundResult Ã¢â‚¬â€ packages winner data into the IRaceResult
#         contract consumed by every resolve* helper.
buildFoundResult
# --- Phase 12a sub-step 4: Race extraction ---
# Six NEW exports landed by Phase 12a sub-step-4 (Race.ts under
# Mediator/Elements/Create/). All six are internal mediator plumbing
# behind the barrel Ã¢â‚¬â€ no public scraper consumes them directly. The
# parent mediator's public surface (lib/index.d.ts) remains
# byte-identical to baseline (A3.5.4 verified).
#
# Reason: IRaceSetup Ã¢â‚¬â€ return shape of setupAllVisibleRace
#         ({entries, locators, timeout}); needed by resolveAllVisibleImpl
#         to destructure race inputs.
IRaceSetup
# Reason: traceRaceDiagnostic Ã¢â‚¬â€ debug-level race-outcome log emitter
#         (winner index + per-locator detail) shared by every race caller.
traceRaceDiagnostic
# Reason: raceEntriesToResult Ã¢â‚¬â€ race entries through hit-test, return
#         found-result for the winner or NOT_FOUND_RESULT; the shared
#         single-winner body for resolveVisibleImpl + resolveVisibleNthAware.
raceEntriesToResult
# Reason: extractWinnerSequence Ã¢â‚¬â€ turn race-winner indices into IRaceResults
#         with DOM-element dedup + selector-specificity ranking + cap;
#         consumed by resolveAllVisibleImpl.
extractWinnerSequence
# Reason: setupAllVisibleRace Ã¢â‚¬â€ prepare race inputs (nth-expanded entries +
#         locator array + capped timeout) for the multi-winner path.
setupAllVisibleRace
# Reason: enrichWinnerToResult Ã¢â‚¬â€ capture identity + value from one winning
#         entry and wrap as IRaceResult; shared by raceEntriesToResult,
#         resolveVisibleInContextImpl, and tryAttachedClickFallback.
enrichWinnerToResult
# --- Phase 12a sub-step 4 (transitional): Debug.ts shim lag ---
# Main has advanced to Phase 12c which migrated the logger cluster from
# src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Types/Debug.ts into src/Scrapers/Pipeline/Logging/Debug.ts,
# leaving Types/Debug.ts as a re-export shim. This branch is based off
# pre-12c main (017eb7e2) so Types/Debug.ts still carries the inline
# export function Ã¢â‚¬Â¦ declarations. The docs-coverage gate diffs us against
# CURRENT main (post-12c shim) and sees these three symbols as "introduced
# in HEAD" because the extractor treats inline export function as a new
# symbol distinct from the shim's export { Ã¢â‚¬Â¦ } from '../Logging/Debug.js'.
#
# These three entries unblock the Phase 12a CreateElementMediator refactor
# from a Phase 12c side effect that the orchestrator will resolve by
# rebasing this branch onto post-12c main before merge. They should be
# REMOVED in the rebase commit alongside the inline declarations.
#
# Reason: ScraperLogger Ã¢â‚¬â€ pre-existing logger type alias, surfaced as
#         "new" only because main inlined the re-export shim.
ScraperLogger
# Reason: getActiveLogContext Ã¢â‚¬â€ pre-existing context accessor, surfaced as
#         "new" only because main inlined the re-export shim.
getActiveLogContext
# Reason: runWithBankContext Ã¢â‚¬â€ pre-existing context binder, surfaced as
#         "new" only because main inlined the re-export shim.
runWithBankContext
# --- Phase 12a sub-step 5: FieldResolve+Wait+Discover extraction ---
# Eight NEW exports landed by Phase 12a sub-step-5 (FieldResolve.ts,
# Wait.ts, Discover.ts under Mediator/Elements/Create/). All eight are
# internal mediator plumbing behind the barrel Ã¢â‚¬â€ no public scraper
# consumes them directly. The parent mediator's public surface
# (lib/index.d.ts) remains byte-identical to baseline (A3.5.4 verified).
#
# Reason: IFormCache Ã¢â‚¬â€ per-instance mutable cache for the form-anchor
#         selector; threaded through discoverForm + scopeToForm.
IFormCache
# Reason: buildResolveField Ã¢â‚¬â€ wraps resolveFieldPipeline with
#         scopedÃ¢â€ â€™wide fallback semantics and error catching;
#         consumed by buildResolveCluster.
buildResolveField
# Reason: buildResolveClickable Ã¢â‚¬â€ clickable-field resolver pinned to
#         the __submit__ fieldKey for WK.__submit__ fallback;
#         consumed by buildResolveCluster.
buildResolveClickable
# Reason: buildDiscoverErrors Ã¢â‚¬â€ Layer-1 DOM scan + Layer-2 WK text
#         fallback packaged as the mediator's discoverErrors method.
buildDiscoverErrors
# Reason: buildDiscoverForm Ã¢â‚¬â€ caches the discovered form anchor and
#         catches non-fatal discovery errors; consumed by
#         buildFormCluster.
buildDiscoverForm
# Reason: buildScopeToForm Ã¢â‚¬â€ uses the cached anchor to re-scope a
#         candidate list (no-op when cache empty); consumed by
#         buildFormCluster.
buildScopeToForm
# Reason: buildWaitForLoadingDone Ã¢â‚¬â€ polls WK_DASHBOARD.LOADING up to
#         3 attempts (ELEMENTS_LOADING_DELAY_MS between attempts);
#         consumed by buildResolveCluster.
buildWaitForLoadingDone
# Reason: ELEMENTS_LOADING_DELAY_MS Ã¢â‚¬â€ inter-attempt polling delay
#         re-exported from Wait.ts so the cluster owns its tuning
#         knob (the constant still lives in ActionExecutors for the
#         other action callers that share the same delay).
ELEMENTS_LOADING_DELAY_MS
# --- Phase 12a sub-step 6: Resolve+Navigation+Observation+Cookies+PhaseControls+Assembly+ActionMediator extraction ---
# Final Phase 12a landing: trims CreateElementMediator.ts from 915 LoC to
# ~38 LoC (Ã¢â€°Â¤150 target) by relocating seven cohesive clusters into sibling
# sub-modules under Mediator/Elements/Create/. All new exports are internal
# mediator plumbing behind the Create/index.ts barrel Ã¢â‚¬â€ no public scraper
# consumes them directly. lib/index.d.ts byte-identical to baseline.
#
# Reason: buildResolveCluster Ã¢â‚¬â€ assembles the 6-method locator/click
#         resolver bundle (resolveField/resolveClickable/resolveVisible/
#         resolveAllVisible/resolveVisibleInContext/resolveAndClick).
buildResolveCluster
# Reason: ResolveBundle Ã¢â‚¬â€ Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for the
#         resolver cluster's slice surface.
ResolveBundle
# Reason: buildFormCluster Ã¢â‚¬â€ assembles the 3-method form-anchor cluster
#         (discoverForm/scopeToForm/getFormAnchor) bound to an IFormCache.
buildFormCluster
# Reason: FormBundle Ã¢â‚¬â€ Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for the
#         form-anchor cluster's slice surface.
FormBundle
# Reason: buildNavCluster Ã¢â‚¬â€ assembles the 5-method navigation cluster
#         (navigateTo/getCurrentUrl/waitForNetworkIdle/raceWithNetworkIdle/
#         waitForURL) with single-source waitForNetworkIdle reuse.
buildNavCluster
# Reason: NavBundle Ã¢â‚¬â€ Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for the
#         navigation cluster's slice surface.
NavBundle
# Reason: buildAttrCluster Ã¢â‚¬â€ assembles the 2-method attribute-read
#         cluster (checkAttribute/getAttributeValue) on locators carried
#         by IRaceResult winners.
buildAttrCluster
# Reason: AttrBundle Ã¢â‚¬â€ Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for the
#         attribute-read cluster's slice surface.
AttrBundle
# Reason: buildCountCluster Ã¢â‚¬â€ assembles the 3-method counting + href
#         cluster (countByText/countBySelector/collectAllHrefs) bound
#         to a Page reference.
buildCountCluster
# Reason: CountBundle Ã¢â‚¬â€ Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for the
#         count/href cluster's slice surface.
CountBundle
# Reason: buildCookieCluster Ã¢â‚¬â€ assembles the 2-method cookie I/O
#         cluster (getCookies/addCookies) over the browser context.
buildCookieCluster
# Reason: CookieBundle Ã¢â‚¬â€ Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for the
#         cookie-I/O cluster's slice surface.
CookieBundle
# Reason: buildPhaseControls Ã¢â‚¬â€ assembles the 4-method phase/stage/
#         discovery cluster, owning the ActiveState pass-through that
#         was previously transient on Create/index.ts.
buildPhaseControls
# Reason: buildStaticCluster Ã¢â‚¬â€ fuses PhaseControlsBundle + AttrBundle
#         so assembleElementMediator's spread count stays Ã¢â€°Â¤ 6.
buildStaticCluster
# Reason: PhaseControlsBundle Ã¢â‚¬â€ Pick<IElementMediator, ...> tuple for
#         the phase/stage/discovery cluster's slice surface.
PhaseControlsBundle
# Reason: StaticBundle Ã¢â‚¬â€ intersection (PhaseControlsBundle & AttrBundle)
#         for the page-independent merged surface.
StaticBundle
# Reason: assembleElementMediator Ã¢â‚¬â€ composes the full IElementMediator
#         method bundle from all six cluster builders (everything
#         except network, which the faÃƒÂ§ade layers on top).
assembleElementMediator
# Reason: extractActionMediator Ã¢â‚¬â€ relocated from the parent
#         CreateElementMediator.ts faÃƒÂ§ade into Create/ActionMediator.ts
#         as part of the Phase 12a sub-step-6 trim. The symbol's public
#         signature is unchanged; the docs-coverage gate flags it as
#         "introduced" because it now ships from a new file path.
extractActionMediator

# Phase 12d split Ã¢â‚¬â€ LoginScopeIntact.ts Ã¢â€ â€™ ScopeIntact/{Types,Otp,
# Disambiguate,Probe}.ts. The parent file shrunk from a 222-line
# mixed-concern module to a 33-line thin facade composing the four
# sub-modules. All 20 symbols below were previously module-private
# helpers; the export keyword exists only to let the sub-modules
# import each other across the new file boundary. The facade
# (validateActionScopeIntact) remains the sole user-facing surface
# and is already documented under docs/architecture/login-pipeline.md.
# Pattern matches the Phase 12a Create/ allowlist entries above.

# Phase 12d split Ã¢â‚¬â€ LoginPostValidate.ts Ã¢â€ â€™ PostValidate/{Detect,Gates,Flow}.ts
# Sub-modules are framework-internal helpers behind the LoginPostValidate.ts
# facade. The facade keeps its 2 public exports (default executeValidateLogin
# + named detectAsyncLoginErrors); these symbols cross-talk between the
# 3 sub-modules and are not part of the consumer-facing API.
# Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬

# Reason: Sub-module accumulator type Ã¢â‚¬â€ passes target map + form anchor through the fold; internal only.
IFieldAccum
# Reason: Sub-module bundle for resolveOneField Ã¢â‚¬â€ keeps the body under the 10-line ceiling.

# Reason: Sub-module bundle for accumulateField Ã¢â‚¬â€ under the 3-param ceiling.

# Reason: Sub-module bundle for maybeDiscoverAnchor.

# Reason: Sub-module trace-tag lookup Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal logging helper.
FIELD_RESULT_TAG
# Reason: Sub-module helper Ã¢â‚¬â€ assembles an IResolvedTarget from a resolved field context.
buildPreTarget
# Reason: Sub-module helper Ã¢â‚¬â€ picks the form anchor's CSS selector, or '' when absent.
pickFormSelector
# Reason: Sub-module helper Ã¢â‚¬â€ maps a field-resolution Procedure into the IResolvedTarget sentinel.
preTargetOrFalse
# Reason: Sub-module helper Ã¢â‚¬â€ resolves one credential field and returns its IResolvedTarget or false.

# Reason: Sub-module helper Ã¢â‚¬â€ accumulates one resolved field into the targets map + emits trace log.

# Reason: Sub-module helper Ã¢â‚¬â€ lazily discovers a form anchor only on the first successful field resolution.
