# Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬
# PR #345 CR round-2 Ã¢â‚¬â€ narrowed Enter-press catch (Actions/ActionsBenignReject.ts)
# Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬

# Reason: Sub-module constant Ã¢â‚¬â€ benign-signal substrings for the Enter-fallback press path.
BENIGN_PRESS_PATTERNS
# Reason: Sub-module type Ã¢â‚¬â€ nominal brand for the press-rejection classification boolean.
BenignPressSignal
# Reason: Sub-module helper Ã¢â‚¬â€ benign-vs-real predicate narrowing the pressEnter catch.
isBenignPressReject

# Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬
# Phase 12e Ã¢â‚¬â€ NavigationTransportProbe split (Mediator/Init/TransportProbe/**)
# Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬Ã¢â€â‚¬
# These symbols moved from the (formerly 1036-LoC) NavigationTransportProbe.ts
# into a focused TransportProbe/ sub-cluster (Types / Reject / Result / Url /
# Dns / Tcp / Tls / Probe) as part of a behavior-preserving facade split. They
# are CROSS-MODULE INTERNALS Ã¢â‚¬â€ phase runners, default dep implementations,
# per-phase input/outcome bundles, and shared sentinels consumed only by the
# sibling sub-modules and the Probe orchestrator. The user-facing surface
# (probeTransport, probeTransportWithDeps, and the I* envelope types) is
# unchanged and still re-exported byte-for-byte through the
# NavigationTransportProbe.ts barrel facade Ã¢â‚¬â€ those public symbols stay
# documented in docs/observability/init-navigation-forensics.md and are NOT
# in this allowlist. None of the symbols below are re-exported from
# lib/index.{cjs,mjs}.

# Reason: Types Ã¢â‚¬â€ input bundle for the injectable tcpConnect dep (host/port/budget). Cross-module internal.
ITcpConnectInput
# Reason: Types Ã¢â‚¬â€ input bundle for the injectable tlsUpgrade dep (socket/host/budget). Cross-module internal.
ITlsUpgradeInput
# Reason: Types Ã¢â‚¬â€ parsed target-URL parts (host/port/isTls) threaded from Url.ts into the phase runners.
IUrlParts
# Reason: Types Ã¢â‚¬â€ per-run probe context carried across the DNS/TCP/TLS phases. Implementation detail.
IProbeContext
# Reason: Types Ã¢â‚¬â€ accumulating timing/result envelope assembled into the final INavTransportProbe.
IProbeEnvelope
# Reason: Types Ã¢â‚¬â€ '' sentinel for an unresolved address before the DNS phase runs.
EMPTY_ADDRESS
# Reason: Types Ã¢â‚¬â€ 0-ms sentinel for any phase that did not run. Shared by Result/Dns/Tcp/Tls.
ZERO_MS
# Reason: Types Ã¢â‚¬â€ 'other-error' outcome literal constant for the catch-all phase failure path.
OUTCOME_OTHER_ERROR
# Reason: Types Ã¢â‚¬â€ zeroed IProbeEnvelope seed used to start every probe run.
EMPTY_ENVELOPE
# Reason: Types Ã¢â‚¬â€ zeroed IUrlParts fallback returned when target-URL parsing fails.
EMPTY_URL
# Reason: Url Ã¢â‚¬â€ discriminated parse result for tryParseTargetUrl (ok parts vs failure outcome).
IParseUrlOutcome
# Reason: Url Ã¢â‚¬â€ internal target-URL parser consumed by the Probe orchestrator. Not user-facing.
tryParseTargetUrl
# Reason: Result Ã¢â‚¬â€ input bundle for buildProbeResult (envelope + outcome + timing). Cross-module internal.
IBuildProbeInput
# Reason: Result Ã¢â‚¬â€ assembles the final INavTransportProbe from phase outputs. Internal helper.
buildProbeResult
# Reason: Dns Ã¢â‚¬â€ production dns.lookup dep implementation injected as the default lookup. Test seam internal.
defaultDnsLookup
# Reason: Dns Ã¢â‚¬â€ discriminated DNS-phase result (resolved address vs failure outcome). Internal.
IDnsPhaseOutcome
# Reason: Dns Ã¢â‚¬â€ DNS-phase input bundle (host/budget/deps). Cross-module internal.
IRunDnsInput
# Reason: Dns Ã¢â‚¬â€ runs the DNS phase within budget; consumed only by the Probe orchestrator.
runDnsPhase
# Reason: Tcp Ã¢â‚¬â€ production net.connect dep implementation injected as the default tcpConnect. Test seam internal.
defaultTcpConnect
# Reason: Tcp Ã¢â‚¬â€ TCP-phase input bundle (address/port/budget/deps). Cross-module internal.
IRunTcpInput
# Reason: Tcp Ã¢â‚¬â€ runs the TCP phase within budget; consumed only by the Probe orchestrator.
runTcpPhase
# Reason: Tls Ã¢â‚¬â€ production tls.connect dep implementation injected as the default tlsUpgrade. Test seam internal.
defaultTlsUpgrade
# Reason: Tls Ã¢â‚¬â€ TLS-phase input bundle (socket/host/budget/deps). Cross-module internal.
IRunTlsInput
# Reason: Tls Ã¢â‚¬â€ runs the TLS phase within budget; consumed only by the Probe orchestrator.
runTlsPhase
# Reason: ApiDirectScrape Ã¢â‚¬â€ action-context payload type for the shape-driven scrape fn; framework-internal phase type relocated to a leaf in the 12g cycle-break (was already exported from ApiDirectScrapePhase.ts). Not user-facing.
ApiDirectScrapeResult
# Reason: ApiDirectScrape Ã¢â‚¬â€ bound phase-action fn type; framework-internal, relocated to a leaf in the 12g cycle-break (was already exported from ApiDirectScrapePhase.ts). Not user-facing.
ApiDirectScrapeFn
# Reason: Form Ã¢â‚¬â€ credential field-fill fn; framework-internal, relocated to the LoginFieldFill leaf in the 12g-2 cycle-break (was already exported from LoginFormFill.ts, still re-exported there). Not user-facing.
fillOneField
# Reason: Form Ã¢â‚¬â€ single-field fill options; framework-internal type relocated to the LoginFieldFill leaf in the 12g-2 cycle-break (was already exported from LoginFormFill.ts). Not user-facing.
IFillOpts
# Reason: Form Ã¢â‚¬â€ bundled fill-field options; framework-internal type relocated to the LoginFieldFill leaf in the 12g-2 cycle-break (was already exported from LoginFormFill.ts). Not user-facing.
IFillFieldOpts
# Reason: Form Ã¢â‚¬â€ field-fill result; framework-internal type relocated to the LoginFieldFill leaf in the 12g-2 cycle-break (was already exported from LoginFormFill.ts). Not user-facing.
IFillResult
# Reason: Elements Ã¢â‚¬â€ element wait options (visibility/timeout); framework-internal type relocated to the ElementsActionTypes leaf in the 12f cycle-break (was already exported from ElementsInteractions.ts, still re-exported there). Not user-facing.
IWaitOptions
# Reason: Elements Ã¢â‚¬â€ single-element page-eval options; framework-internal type relocated to the ElementsActionTypes leaf in the 12f cycle-break (was already exported from ElementsInteractions.ts, still re-exported there). Not user-facing.
IPageEvalOpts
# Reason: Elements Ã¢â‚¬â€ multi-element page-eval options; framework-internal type relocated to the ElementsActionTypes leaf in the 12f cycle-break (was already exported from ElementsInteractions.ts, still re-exported there). Not user-facing.
IPageEvalAllOpts
# Reason: BalanceResolve Ã¢â‚¬â€ per-bank balance-resolution discriminant ('account' | 'card-cycle') on IPipelineBankConfig; framework-internal config knob that gates the balance-resolve live fetch. Deposit banks declare 'account'; card companies declare 'card-cycle'. REQUIRED Ã¢â‚¬â€ every bank states its kind explicitly; absence is a config error, not a silent no-op. Not user-facing mkdocs surface (mirrors BalanceSlotKey/IDashboardTargets config types already allowlisted).
BalanceKind
# Reason: Banks Ã¢â‚¬â€ Leumi declarative login config (credential keys only; WellKnown resolves selectors); framework-internal bank-registration surface consumed by the integration test wiring (BankLoginConfigs), mirroring every other pipeline bank's *_LOGIN. Not user-facing.
LEUMI_LOGIN
# Reason: AuthDiscoveryGate Ã¢â‚¬â€ per-bank auth-completion-family discriminant ('token' | 'session-cookie' | 'api-direct') on IPipelineBankConfig; framework-internal config knob that declares how auth success is verified. REQUIRED Ã¢â‚¬â€ every bank states its kind explicitly; tsc enforces completeness. Not user-facing mkdocs surface; mirrors BalanceKind (already allowlisted above).
AuthStrategyKind

# Reason: LoginForensicTrace Ã¯Â¿Â½ gated diagnostic handlers (PIPELINE_AUTH_REQ_TRACE gate).
# Attached only when the trace gate is ON; zero-surface in production. CI diagnostic only.
buildConsoleHandler
# Reason: LoginForensicTrace Ã¯Â¿Â½ gated diagnostic handlers (PIPELINE_AUTH_REQ_TRACE gate).
# Attached only when the trace gate is ON; zero-surface in production. CI diagnostic only.
buildPageErrorHandler
# Reason: LoginForensicTrace Ã¯Â¿Â½ gated diagnostic handlers (PIPELINE_AUTH_REQ_TRACE gate).
# Attached only when the trace gate is ON; zero-surface in production. CI diagnostic only.
buildPopupHandler
# Reason: SubmitModeGate Ã¢â‚¬â€ gated D3 diagnostic lever (PIPELINE_LOGIN_SUBMIT_MODE gate).
# Default 'enter-click' is byte-identical. CI A/B diagnostic only; not user-facing.
readSubmitMode
# Reason: SubmitModeGate Ã¢â‚¬â€ discriminated union type for the D3 submit-mode lever.
# Internal gate type; not user-facing.
SubmitMode
# Reason: SubmitModeGate Ã¢â‚¬â€ env-var name constant for the D3 submit-mode lever.
# Exported so tests can reference it without hardcoding the string. Not user-facing.
SUBMIT_MODE_ENV_VAR
# Reason: ActionsFill Ã¢â‚¬â€ @internal D3 requestSubmit helper, exported for unit-test access only.
# No docs-surface needed; gated behaviour, not public API.
tryFormRequestSubmit
# Reason: NetworkTimingConfig - body-read-race settle ceiling for awaitTraffic.
# After a matched (headers-only) response, the gate re-polls the live capture pool
# for up to this budget so the body-bearing endpoint settles. Framework-internal
# timing knob; exported only so the NetworkPolling race test asserts it. Not user-facing.
NETWORK_BODY_SETTLE_MS
# Reason: DashboardTxnMatch Ã¢â‚¬â€ shared TXN-page URL predicate reused by the DASHBOARD
# click-walker, dashboard href-extraction, and the ACCOUNT-RESOLVE nudge (dedup of
# TXN_PAGE_PATTERNS.some) and driven by the DashboardWK pin test. Framework-internal
# matcher, not user-facing public API.
isTxnPageUrl
# Reason: WindowParams Ã¢â‚¬â€ hasWindowParams detects a COMPLETE fromDate+toDate window
# (top-level query keys OR keys nested inside a JSON-valued param such as Max's
# filterData). Framework-internal predicate for the ShapeAware windowParamsMatch
# picker tier; exported so the ShapeAware empty-cycle regression test drives it.
# Not user-facing public API.
hasWindowParams
# Reason: BancsDateRead — readBancsFromDate reads the captured GREATERTHAN*
# OrigDt from-bound of a BaNCS CURRENT_ACCOUNT body (Yahav). Framework-internal
# READ complement of applyBancsChunkRange; exported so the SCRAPE firstWave gate
# (AccountScrapeFirstWave) can tell a narrow dashboard-preview window from one
# that already covers the requested range, and so the BancsDateRead unit test
# drives it. Not user-facing public API.
readBancsFromDate
# Reason: BancsDateTemplate — todayDatePart returns today as BaNCS calendar
# parts (local calendar, matching the month-chunk generator). Framework-internal
# helper backing the current-month to-bound cap; exported so the to-bound-cap
# unit test asserts against this exact source of truth instead of duplicating
# the extraction. Not user-facing public API.
todayDatePart

# Reason: ApiDirectScrapeDispatchArgs -- framework-internal driver context type,
# relocated verbatim from ApiDirectScrapeSteps.ts by the REST-GET file split so the
# import graph stays one-directional (Actions -> Steps -> DispatchArgs). Consumed only
# within the ApiDirectScrape phase; never re-exported from the package index. Not user-facing.
IDriverCtx
# Reason: ApiDirectScrapeDispatchArgs -- framework-internal per-account context type
# (extends IDriverCtx), relocated verbatim from ApiDirectScrapeSteps.ts by the REST-GET
# file split. Phase-internal; never re-exported from the package index. Not user-facing.
IAcctCtx
# Reason: ApiDirectScrapeDispatchArgs -- framework-internal factory that builds the
# customer-step dispatch args (urlTag + method + vars). Promoted to module scope by the
# REST-GET file split; consumed only by ApiDirectScrapeSteps. Not user-facing.
buildCustomerDispatchArgs
# Reason: ApiDirectScrapeDispatchArgs -- framework-internal factory that builds the
# balance-step dispatch args. Promoted to module scope by the REST-GET file split;
# consumed only by ApiDirectScrapeSteps. Not user-facing.
buildBalanceDispatchArgs
# Reason: ApiDirectScrapeDispatchArgs -- framework-internal factory that builds the
# transactions-step dispatch args. Promoted to module scope by the REST-GET file split;
# consumed only by ApiDirectScrapeSteps. Not user-facing.
buildTxnsDispatchArgs
# Reason: ApiDirectScrapeDispatchArgs -- framework-internal resolver that mirrors
# resolveCustomerUrlTag for the optional secondary-identity GET (customer.secondaryUrlTag).
# Consumed only by ApiDirectScrapeSteps; never re-exported from the package index. Not user-facing.
resolveSecondaryUrlTag

# --- P2 Discount hard-model post-auth scrape shape (browser-bank migration) ---
# Reason: IDiscountAcct â€” Discount scrape-shape account ref (accountId path id +
# displayNumber); consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal,
# not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
IDiscountAcct
# Reason: TITAN_API â€” Titan gateway origin const shared by the Discount shape's
# customer/balance/txns urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract constant.
TITAN_API
# Reason: extractAccounts â€” Discount customer-step extractor (UserAccountsData.UserAccounts
# flatten). Per-bank shape closure consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
extractAccounts
# Reason: accountNumberOf â€” Discount shape accessor returning the branded display number.
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
accountNumberOf
# Reason: customerUrl â€” Discount customer-step urlTag (static Titan userAccountsData URL).
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
customerUrl
# Reason: noVars â€” Discount empty-vars builder (Titan GET calls carry params in the URL).
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
noVars
# Reason: txnsUrl â€” Discount transactions-step urlTag (the /Date full-history endpoint).
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
txnsUrl
# Reason: txnsExtractPage â€” Discount transactions-step page extractor (raw OperationEntry
# rows, terminal cursor). Per-bank shape closure consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE.
txnsExtractPage
# Reason: txnsVars â€” Discount transactions-step vars builder. Per-bank shape closure
# consumed only by DISCOUNT_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
txnsVars

# --- P3 VisaCal hard-model post-auth scrape shape (card-cycle browser bank) ---
# Reason: CAL_API â€” CAL API gateway origin const shared by the VisaCal shape's
# customer/transactions urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract constant.
CAL_API
# Reason: IVisaCalCard â€” VisaCal scrape-shape card ref (cardUniqueId query id +
# displayNumber last-4); consumed only by VISACAL_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal,
# not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
IVisaCalCard
# Reason: extractCards â€” VisaCal customer-step extractor (result.cards[] flatten).
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by VISACAL_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
extractCards
# Reason: customerVars â€” VisaCal customer-step POST body builder ({"tokenGuid":""}).
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by VISACAL_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
customerVars

# --- P4 Amex hard-model post-auth scrape shape (card-cycle browser bank) ---
# Reason: AMEX_API - Amex DigitalV3 SPA origin const shared by the Amex shape's
# customer/transactions urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract constant.
AMEX_API
# Reason: IAmexCard - Amex scrape-shape card ref (cardSuffix last-4 + per-card
# companyCode); consumed only by AMEX_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal,
# not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
IAmexCard
# Reason: mergeAmexRows - Amex transactions-step row merger (approvals + israelAbroad
# vouchers + currentTransactionsList). Per-bank shape closure consumed only by AMEX_SHAPE.
mergeAmexRows
# --- P4 Max hard-model post-auth scrape shape (card-cycle browser bank) ---
# Reason: MAX_API - Max registered API origin const shared by the Max shape's
# customer/transactions urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract constant.
MAX_API
# Reason: IMaxCard - Max scrape-shape card ref (last4 matching a txn row's
# shortCardNumber); consumed only by MAX_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal,
# not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
IMaxCard
# Reason: clientVersionOf - Max shape reader for the SPA build-version stashed on the
# mediator session-context at BIND-API-MEDIATOR. Per-bank shape closure, not user-facing.
clientVersionOf
# Reason: withVersion - Max shape URL helper appending the discovered &v= build param.
# Per-bank shape closure consumed only by MAX_SHAPE helpers. Not user-facing.
withVersion
# Reason: filterMaxRows - Max transactions-step row filter (per-card last-4 filter over
# the merged result.transactions[]). Per-bank shape closure consumed only by MAX_SHAPE.
filterMaxRows
# Reason: ANGULAR_LOGIN_POLL - shared slow-AngularJS login completion-poll budget
# (Isracard/Amex) composed from the LOGIN_COMPLETION_POLL_* timing consts. Framework-internal.
ANGULAR_LOGIN_POLL
# --- P4 Leumi hard-model post-auth scrape shape (account browser bank) ---
# Reason: leumiBrokerUrl - Leumi WCF broker urlTag builder (module rides the
# moduleName query). Per-bank shape helper consumed only by LEUMI_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
leumiBrokerUrl
# Reason: parseJsonResp - Leumi WCF response unwrapper (JSON.parse of the jsonResp
# envelope field). Shared by all three Leumi extractors. Framework-internal.
parseJsonResp
# Reason: sessionHeader - Leumi WCF SessionHeader builder (primed SessionID + fixed
# FIID). Consumed only by the Leumi shape inner-request builders. Not user-facing.
sessionHeader
# Reason: wcfEnvelope - Leumi WCF double-encoded envelope builder ({moduleName,
# reqObj, version}). Shared by the accounts/balance/txns vars builders. Not user-facing.
wcfEnvelope
# Reason: GET_ACCOUNTS_MODULE - Leumi UC_SO_GetAccounts module-name const shared by the
# shape urlTag + envelope moduleName. Bank contract constant, not user-facing.
GET_ACCOUNTS_MODULE
# Reason: ILeumiAcct - Leumi scrape-shape account ref (accountIndex + displayNumber);
# consumed only by LEUMI_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal, not in src/index.ts.
ILeumiAcct
# Reason: IUcSo27Variant - Leumi UC_SO_27 request variant shape (requestType/dates/
# periodType); component of the shared balance + txns vars builder. Not user-facing.
IUcSo27Variant
# Reason: UC_SO_27_MODULE - Leumi UC_SO_27 business-account-trx module-name const shared
# by the balance + txns urlTag. Bank contract constant, not user-facing.
UC_SO_27_MODULE
# Reason: ucSo27Vars - Leumi shared UC_SO_27 vars builder (balance empty-range + txns
# dated OpersB). Per-bank shape closure consumed only by LEUMI_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
ucSo27Vars
# --- P4 Isracard hard-model post-auth scrape shape (card-cycle browser bank) ---
# Reason: ISRACARD_API - Isracard DigitalV3 SPA origin const (web.isracard.co.il) shared
# by the Isracard shape's customer/transactions urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank
# contract constant, not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
ISRACARD_API
# Reason: IIsracardCard - Isracard scrape-shape card ref (cardSuffix last-4 + per-card
# companyCode); consumed only by ISRACARD_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal,
# not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
IIsracardCard
# Reason: mergeIsracardRows - Isracard transactions-step row merger (approvals + israelAbroad
# vouchers + currentTransactionsList). Per-bank shape closure consumed only by ISRACARD_SHAPE.
mergeIsracardRows
# --- P4 Mercantile hard-model post-auth scrape shape (browser-bank migration) ---
# Reason: IMercantileAcct - Mercantile scrape-shape account ref (accountId path id +
# displayNumber); consumed only by MERCANTILE_SHAPE + its helpers. Shares Discount's
# Titan contract; pipeline-internal, not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers
# public surface (not in src/index.ts).
IMercantileAcct
# --- Framework: anti-replay cookie-echo header sentinel (BrowserFetchStrategy) ---
# Reason: INamedCookie - minimal {name,value} cookie record read by the @cookie:<name>
# header resolver; structural subset of Playwright's Cookie. Framework-internal, not
# part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
INamedCookie
# Reason: hasCookieSentinel - pure predicate letting BrowserFetchStrategy skip the async
# cookie read when no @cookie:<name> sentinel is present. Framework-internal, not user-facing.
hasCookieSentinel
# Reason: substituteCookieHeaders - pure resolver echoing a login cookie's value into an
# outgoing request header (Hapoalim X-XSRF-TOKEN <- XSRF-TOKEN cookie). Framework-internal.
substituteCookieHeaders
# Reason: COOKIE_HEADER_SENTINEL_PREFIX - the '@cookie:' literal prefix a shape uses to
# request a login cookie be echoed into a request header. Framework-internal constant.
COOKIE_HEADER_SENTINEL_PREFIX
# Reason: CookieJar - readonly INamedCookie[] snapshot passed to substituteCookieHeaders;
# structural alias over Playwright cookies. Framework-internal, not user-facing.
CookieJar
# Reason: HasCookieSentinel - branded boolean (Rule #15 nominal return) for the
# hasCookieSentinel predicate; framework-internal, not user-facing.
HasCookieSentinel

# --- P4 Hapoalim hard-model post-auth scrape shape (account browser bank) ---
# Reason: HAPOALIM_API - Hapoalim ServerServices gateway origin const shared by the Hapoalim
# shape's customer/balance/transactions urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract
# constant, not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
HAPOALIM_API
# Reason: IHapoalimAcct - Hapoalim scrape-shape account ref (composite
# bankNumber-branchNumber-accountNumber id); consumed only by HAPOALIM_SHAPE + its helpers.
# Pipeline-internal, not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
IHapoalimAcct
# Reason: txnsHeaders - Hapoalim anti-replay POST header builder (cookie-echo X-XSRF-TOKEN +
# fixed pageUuid + fresh uuid + exact content-type). Per-bank shape helper consumed only by
# HAPOALIM_SHAPE. Framework-internal, not user-facing.
txnsHeaders

# --- P4 Beinleumi (FIBI) hard-model post-auth scrape shape (account browser bank, OTP) ---
# Reason: BEINLEUMI_API - FIBI online gateway origin const shared by the Beinleumi shape's
# customer/secondary/balance/transactions urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract
# constant, not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
BEINLEUMI_API
# Reason: BFF_BASE - FIBI bff-balancetransactions path prefix const shared by the accountType,
# balances, and list urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract constant, not user-facing.
BFF_BASE
# Reason: USER_DATA_PATH - FIBI userData accounts path const consumed only by the Beinleumi
# customerUrl builder. Framework-internal bank contract constant, not user-facing.
USER_DATA_PATH
# Reason: IBeinleumiAcct - Beinleumi scrape-shape account ref (accountNumber + branch +
# session accountType); consumed only by BEINLEUMI_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal,
# not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
IBeinleumiAcct
# Reason: secondaryUrl - Beinleumi session-level accountType identity urlTag builder wired to
# customer.secondaryUrlTag. Per-bank shape helper consumed only by BEINLEUMI_SHAPE. Not user-facing.
secondaryUrl
# Reason: uid - Beinleumi fresh per-request correlation GUID builder for the FIBI `uid` query
# param; consumed only by the Beinleumi urlTag builders. Framework-internal helper, not user-facing.
uid

# --- P4 Massad (FIBI) hard-model post-auth scrape shape (account browser bank, OTP) ---
# Reason: MASSAD_API - FIBI online gateway origin const shared by the Massad shape's
# customer/secondary/balance/transactions urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract
# constant, not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
MASSAD_API
# Reason: IMassadAcct - Massad scrape-shape account ref (accountNumber + branch + session
# accountType); consumed only by MASSAD_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal, not part of the
# @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
IMassadAcct

# --- P4 Otsar Hahayal (FIBI) hard-model post-auth scrape shape (account browser bank, OTP) ---
# Reason: OTSAR_HAHAYAL_API - FIBI online gateway origin const shared by the Otsar Hahayal shape's
# customer/secondary/balance/transactions urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract
# constant, not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
OTSAR_HAHAYAL_API
# Reason: IOtsarHahayalAcct - Otsar Hahayal scrape-shape account ref (accountNumber + branch +
# session accountType); consumed only by OTSAR_HAHAYAL_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal, not
# part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
IOtsarHahayalAcct
# --- P4 Pagi (FIBI) hard-model post-auth scrape shape (account browser bank, OTP) ---
# Reason: PAGI_API - FIBI online gateway origin const shared by the Pagi shape's
# customer/secondary/balance/transactions urlTag builders. Framework-internal bank contract
# constant, not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface (not in src/index.ts).
PAGI_API
# Reason: IPagiAcct - Pagi scrape-shape account ref (accountNumber + branch + session
# accountType); consumed only by PAGI_SHAPE + its helpers. Pipeline-internal, not part of the
# @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public surface.
IPagiAcct
# --- AuthDiscovery storage-tier chain single-sourced for BIND reuse ---
# Reason: storageTiers - page-only sessionStorage discovery chain (main page 3a ->
# all frames 3b -> all keys 3c) extracted from Orchestrator.ts so both the generic
# AuthDiscovery orchestrator and the BIND-API-MEDIATOR auth-prime find frame-scoped
# SPA tokens identically. Framework-internal plumbing consumed only by Orchestrator.ts
# + BindApiMediatorAuth.ts; not part of the @sergienko4/israeli-bank-scrapers public
# surface (Pipeline is internal to the scrapers, not exported via src/index.ts).
storageTiers
# Reason: Yahav (TCS BaNCS Digital) hard-model scrape shape. The envelope
# template blocks, payload builders, account/txn extractors, and the assembled
# shape are per-bank data + closures consumed only within the Yahav pipeline
# and the shared ApiDirectScrape driver. Framework-internal; never re-exported
# from the package index. Not user-facing public API.
API_VER
APP_VER
CLIENT_APP
DEVICE
ENVELOPE_STATIC
LOCALE
PROXY_APP
RESOURCE
buildEnvelope
portfolioRefs
csrfHeaders
IPortfolioRefs
YAHAV_API

IYahavAcct
msgId
accountsPayload
balancePayload
refDataList
txnsPayload
extractYahavAccounts

YAHAV_TXNS
YAHAV_SHAPE
# Reason: BindApiMediatorBancs -- the captured BaNCS session-value bundle
# (SecToken + portfolio refs) stashed on the mediator session-context at
# BIND-API-MEDIATOR. Framework-internal; consumed only by the BIND actions.
# Not user-facing.
IBancsCapture
# Reason: BindApiMediatorBancsCsrf -- sniffs the TCS BaNCS CSRF request header
# (login-response csrfTkn value-matched to the request-header name) from the
# login-boot pool so the hard-model fetch can replay it. Framework-internal;
# consumed only by BindApiMediatorBancs. Not user-facing.
scanCsrf
ICsrfHeader
